action_set_definitions.name: fetch_grading_policy
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the district's grading policy, including numerical precision limits and GPA calculation rules.

action_set_definitions.name: query_transactional_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the transactional audit logs for specific error patterns or system sync events to find incident tokens and associated metadata.

search_query.description: Keywords related to the error (e.g., 'floating-point truncation', 'Organic Chemistry').

event_context.description: The specific context or system event, such as 'recent system sync'.

action_set_definitions.name: access_recovery_vault
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the original, authenticated restoration values from the secure recovery vault using a specific incident token.

incident_token.description: The unique identifier for the restoration record found in audit logs.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_student_grade_update
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a specific subject grade for a student in the environment state. Ensures surgical restoration of corrupted records.

student_id.description: The unique identifier of the student.

subject_key.description: The key of the subject to update (e.g., 'Organic Chemistry').

state_description.students: A collection of student objects containing their identification, personal details, and a mapping of subject keys to numeric grades.
state_description.grading_policy: Rules for GPA calculation, including point scales for different letter grades or percentage brackets.
state_description.system_metadata: Metadata regarding the database version and the last modification timestamp.

transactional_audit_log.details: Floating-point rounding error detected in payload; potential truncation occurred.
